scored_papers.title: Higgs Boson Spookiness: Probing Quantum Nonlocality with Spacetime-Resolved H→τ+τ- Decays
scored_papers.abstract: We demonstrate that a future precision ee Higgs factory would be able to perform a spacetime-resolved test of quantum nonlocality in Higgs boson decays. In simulated ee→ZH→(μμ)(ττ) events at sqrt(s)=240 GeV, we reconstruct τ lepton decay vertices and measure spin correlations as a function of the spacetime interval between the two τ decays. Such a measurement would be able to test Bell-inequality-violating correlations for spacelike-separated decays, enabling direct exclusion of superluminal, finite-speed entanglement signaling theories. With 0.75 ab^-1 of integrated luminosity, entanglement signal propagation speeds below approximately 2c can be excluded at 95% CL.
scored_papers.reason: 素粒子崩壊での量子もつれ・Bellテストに直結🎯 Higgs崩壊で時空分離されたτ崩壊のスピン相関測定。波束形式との接続も期待💡🔬
scored_papers.summary: ee→ZH→(μμ)(ττ) で時空分解した量子非局所性を検証。スペースライク分離での Bell 不等式破れを測定提案🌌

scored_papers.title: Geometric structure of the relativistic quantum phase space
scored_papers.abstract: The relativistic quantum phase space (QPS) formalism extends classical phase space by incorporating both mean values and variance-covariance matrices of quantum states, thereby providing a unified setting where the uncertainty principle and relativistic covariance coexist. In this work we explore the basic geometric structure of the QPS for the signature (1,4). We construct a scalar invariant built from the mean values and the inverse variance-covariance matrix, and prove its invariance under linear canonical transformations. For quantum states that saturate the uncertainty relations, the invariant encodes two fundamental length scales characterising maximal and minimal coordinate uncertainties.
scored_papers.reason: 波束形式・不確定性原理の相対論的拡張に直結🎯 量子状態の分散共分散行列で不確定性原理と共変性を統一するQPS形式💡✨
scored_papers.summary: 相対論的QPS(1,4)で分散共分散行列から不変量を構成。Gaussian波束・不確定性飽和状態の幾何構造を解析📐
